name: Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II
aliases: STAR WARS: The Force Unleashed II

steps.payload: payload/fix/Star Wars - The Force Unleashed II/60 FPS/SWTFU2.exe

post_apply_message: TFU2 is set to 60 FPS. The -VariableTimeSteps -vsync launch options (set automatically on Steam installs) tame the Force-grip physics at high FPS. Other caps (40/50/Unlimited) are in the extracted payload — change the variant path in manifest.json to switch.
notes: FPS cap fix from PCGamingWiki community file 506, shared archive with force-unleashed-1 (each recipe fetches its own copy — 30MB twice, keeps recipes self-contained). Verified 2026-07-06: capped variants differ from the original GOG exe by exactly 1 byte (0x1E at 0x177BF); matches the documented hex edit for this game (C7 86 60 01 00 00 1E). Steam exe is DRM-wrapped so the GOG exe swap is the standard approach. Launch options per the Steam guide 'New 60fps fix' (id 1701441661). Original kept as SWTFU2.exe.gfm-orig.
